tasks.title: Daily TD sequential lag fix
tasks.notes: 2026-03-24 已完成日 K 九转滞后修正。排查结论：前端 `chartStrategyRegistry.js` 与后端 `StockCopilotMcpService.CalculateTdSequential(...)` 都采用严格 `>` / `<`，当 `close == close[4]` 时直接重置计数；这在 A 股常见的 0.01 价位台阶里会吞掉 setup bar，导致相对常见九转口径慢 1-2 根。前端还存在一个附带问题：同方向连续趋势在到达 9 后会立即重新起算，容易生成重复 setup。现已统一为“相等收盘沿用当前 setup 方向、计数可推进到 9，但同方向到 9 后不重复继续发新标记”。验证包括前端单测 `npm --prefix .\frontend run test:unit -- src/modules/stocks/StockCharts.spec.js` 21/21 通过，新增回归样本锁定两根 equality bar 仍能到 `TD卖9`；后端单测 `dotnet test .\backend\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~StockCopilotMcpServiceTests"` 4/4 通过，新增回归锁定 MCP `td` 信号计数为 9。Browser MCP 还补做了 backend-served 股票页 `http://localhost:5119/?tab=stock-info` 的最小验收：页面可加载、`sh600000` 查询成功、`TD九转` 文本可见、CopilotBrowser console 0 error。

tasks.title: Stock-and-fund extension interface adoption plan
tasks.notes: 2026-03-19 已完成 `noupload/stock-and-fund-chrome-master` 接口探测与替代规划，并按 R1/R2/R3/R4/R5 五个切片收口。结论：扩展核心快链路主要是腾讯 `qt.gtimg.cn/smartbox` 与东方财富 `push2/push2his/push2ex` 公开端点；在线探测确认腾讯报价/搜索、东方财富分时/K线/逐笔、主力资金、北向资金、涨跌分布可用。现有后端已覆盖腾讯报价/搜索与东方财富分时/K线/逐笔，因此不做整包替换，而是按切片吸收缺失的批量行情、资金流、市场广度、实时板块榜与更多前端高频决策入口。扩展中作者自建 `110.40.187.161` 云服务虽可访问，但无 SLA、编码不稳定、契约不可控，不纳入正式生产依赖。R2 已完成实时总览单飞锁、超时与 stale cache 降级；R3 已把总览接入 `情绪轮动` 页签；R4 已继续下沉到 `股票信息` 页右侧，提供当前标的对照市场的实时上下文；R5 已新增 `/api/market/sectors/realtime`、将默认分时切到东方财富优先，并把实时市场上下文继续下沉到 `情绪轮动` 实时板块榜、`股票推荐` 推荐前市场快照和交易计划总览 `市场快链路`。

tasks.title: Stock detail non-chart slimming and benchmark capture
tasks.notes: 2026-03-19 follow-up completed: `/api/stocks/detail` was slimmed into a non-chart summary endpoint that now returns quote + messages + optional fundamental snapshot only, while `StockSyncService.SaveDetailAsync(...)` keeps saving basic quote/profile/message data and no longer persists minute/K-line rows from the detail path. Browser MCP benchmark on `http://localhost:5119/` recorded first-open parallel fetch total at 6708ms, `detail-summary` at 2090ms, `chart-day` at 6705ms, and interval switches at `chart-month` 7ms / `chart-year` 4ms. A review follow-up then narrowed `/api/stocks/detail/cache` to summary-only by default as well, with legacy DB-backed chart replay preserved only behind explicit `includeLegacyCharts=true`, so the cache endpoint no longer silently resumes chart responsibilities. A later bottleneck pass confirmed the remaining visible chart delay was mostly caused by a redundant default quote fetch inside `/api/stocks/chart`, not by K-line retrieval itself; the stock terminal now requests `/api/stocks/chart` with `includeQuote=false`, and `月K/年K` also use `includeMinute=false`. A 2026-03-20 regression fix then restored first-open rendering for newly searched symbols with no cache/history by re-enabling `includeQuote=true` only when the workspace does not yet hold a quote, while already loaded workspaces still keep the lightweight refresh path. Cold-start runtime probe after restart showed `chart-day-cold-first` dropped to 467ms while standalone default `/api/stocks/quote` still took about 8815ms. Verification: `dotnet test .\backend\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests.csproj --filter "StockSyncServiceTests|HighFrequencyQuoteServiceTests|StockDetailCacheQueriesTests"` 9/9 passed, the expanded backend filter run passed 16/16, `npm --prefix .\frontend run test:unit -- src/modules/stocks/StockInfoTab.spec.js` later passed 46/46 after adding the no-cache first-open regression test, and Browser MCP page smoke check returned 0 console errors.

tasks.title: Conversational Copilot redesign and grounded answer loop
tasks.notes: 2026-03-24 新增 R5：按 GitHub Copilot 风格重构 Stock Copilot，目标不再是右侧堆叠卡片，而是单一聊天工作台。新的用户可见形态必须满足：1) 以对话消息为中心，支持上下文连续会话；2) 每轮回答必须产出清晰的最终结论，而不是停留在草案/待执行状态；3) 展示结构化思维流程摘要，但不暴露原始 chain-of-thought；4) MCP 调用、证据抓取、网页/公告内容采用简写卡片 + 点击展开全文；5) 工具执行轨迹、耗时、降级与失败要内嵌在消息流中；6) 去掉当前分散的 timeline / acceptance / replay 大卡片默认铺满式布局，仅把质量与 replay 放入折叠侧栏或会话详情抽屉。设计文档见 `docs/stock-copilot-chat-redesign-20260324.md`，规划报告见 `.automation/reports/GOAL-AGENT-002-R5-PLAN-20260324.md`。2026-03-24 细化执行拆分：R5-A 后端受控 loop 与 grounded final answer 状态机；R5-B 交易计划 gating 与 commander 完整性校验；R5-C Evidence 摘要清洗与展开模型；R5-D 聊天主视图与 turn group 重排；R5-E 详情抽屉与 acceptance/replay 下沉；R5-F 多轮上下文与历史承接；R5-G 单测、Browser MCP 验证与自动化报告收口。详细任务清单见 `.automation/reports/GOAL-AGENT-002-R5-PLAN-DETAIL-20260324.md`。

tasks.title: Single-host single-process packaged runtime
